description:
You are a nurse at a chronic disease management clinic. Patient Elena Vasquez (DOB: 1962-08-14, Female) presents for a follow-up visit. Her chart contains errors that need correction: last name is misspelled as "Vasques" and her address is outdated. Correct her last name to "Vasquez" and update her address to 2847 Maple Grove Lane, Portland, Oregon, 97205, United States.

Start a Facility Visit at the Outpatient Clinic and complete the clinical intake. Record today's vitals: BP 158/94 mmHg, Weight 87.3 kg, Height 165 cm, Temperature 36.8°C, Pulse 82 bpm, SpO2 96%. The patient reports a new severe allergy to Morphine (Reaction: Anaphylaxis, Severity: Severe) — document this allergy. Given the new opioid allergy, review her current medications and discontinue any opioid medication that is now contraindicated, then prescribe Acetaminophen 500mg oral twice daily as replacement pain management. Order Hemoglobin A1c and Serum Creatinine lab tests. Schedule a follow-up appointment within 14 days.

Login credentials: admin / Admin123
OpenMRS URL: http://localhost/openmrs/spa

metadata.occupation_context: Chronic disease management nurse — follow-up visit with medication reconciliation
